name: Flight Tracker
author: fbnlrz
description: Live flight status, schedule and airborne position for a flight reservation, from AeroDataBox and adsb.fi.

settings.label: AeroDataBox RapidAPI key
settings.hint: Optional. Get a free key at rapidapi.com/aedbx-aedbx/api/aerodatabox for schedule, gate and delay data. You can also paste it directly in the widget. Without it, only live position from adsb.fi is shown.
